gameContext.scope: Curated starter templates for all 40 live specializations. Defaults are starting points; talent choices, haste, cooldown reduction, encounter context, and combat-log aura IDs can require adjustment.

configurationNotes: Each metric object now contains only fields exposed by the supplied custom-metric editor.
aura uses stackComparator, stacks, and auraKind. It no longer uses an idle timer.
buff_missing uses auraKind and inCombatOnly. It no longer uses an idle timer.
charges_capped uses maxCharges and rechargeSeconds. Recharge values are editable base defaults; talents, passives, haste, and cooldown reduction may change the observed value.
Metadata such as requiresReview and contextSensitive remains outside metric so the dropdown can warn users without passing unsupported fields into the editor.

templates.name: Avoid capping Runic Power
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Runic Power when a Death Strike could usually be banked or spent.

templates.name: Use Dancing Rune Weapon
templates.description: Highlights time Dancing Rune Weapon is ready while actively fighting.

templates.name: Use Vampiric Blood
templates.description: Highlights time Vampiric Blood is ready during combat.

templates.name: Maintain Bone Shield
templates.description: Flags combat time without Bone Shield. Review pull transitions separately.

templates.name: Avoid capping Runic Power
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Runic Power before Frost Strike or other spenders.

templates.name: Use Pillar of Frost
templates.description: Highlights unused Pillar of Frost windows.

templates.name: Use Empower Rune Weapon
templates.description: Highlights unused Empower Rune Weapon windows.

templates.name: Avoid capping Runic Power
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Runic Power before Death Coil or Epidemic spending.

templates.name: Pool Fury for Void Ray
templates.description: Flags 90+ Fury. On Devourer this can be desirable briefly because Void Ray requires 100 Fury; inspect whether the pool was converted promptly.

templates.name: Avoid capped Reap charges
templates.description: Highlights capped Reap charges when Second Helping grants a second charge.
reviewReasons: Second Helping adds a charge and Umbral Blade can make the cooldown hasted.

templates.name: Use Soul Immolation
templates.description: Highlights unused Soul Immolation windows for resource generation and self-healing.

templates.name: Avoid capping Fury
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Fury before Chaos Strike, Blade Dance, or other spenders.

templates.name: Avoid capping Fury
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Fury before Soul Cleave or Spirit Bomb spending.

templates.name: Avoid capped Demon Spikes charges
reviewReasons: The displayed base spell has one charge; verify the Vengeance passive/talent-adjusted maximum used by the analyzer.

templates.name: Avoid capping Astral Power
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Astral Power before Starsurge or Starfall spending.

templates.name: Use Force of Nature
templates.description: Highlights unused Force of Nature windows.

templates.name: Spend capped Combo Points
templates.description: Flags periods at 5+ Combo Points before a finisher. Raise the threshold for builds with a higher cap.

templates.name: Avoid capping Rage
templates.description: Flags periods at 90+ Rage before Ironfur, Maul, or other spending.

templates.name: Avoid capped Survival Instincts charges
reviewReasons: Charge count and recharge behavior are talent-sensitive.

templates.name: Maintain Ironfur during physical tanking
templates.description: Flags combat time without Ironfur. Evaluate only during dangerous physical tanking windows.

templates.name: Watch low Mana
templates.description: Flags time at 20% Mana or lower. This is a risk indicator, not automatically a mistake.

templates.name: Use Innervate
templates.description: Highlights time Innervate remains unused during combat.

templates.name: Maintain Lifebloom
templates.description: Flags time with no Lifebloom active on allies. Context-sensitive during downtime.

templates.name: Avoid capping Essence
templates.description: Flags periods at 5 Essence before spending.

templates.name: Use Breath of Eons
templates.description: Highlights unused Breath of Eons windows.

templates.name: Maintain Ebon Might
templates.description: Flags periods where allies lack Ebon Might while you are actively fighting.

templates.name: Avoid capping Essence
templates.description: Flags periods at 5 Essence before spending.

templates.name: Avoid capping Essence
templates.description: Flags periods at 5 Essence before spending on Echo or Emerald Blossom.

templates.name: Use Call of the Wild

templates.name: Avoid capped Wildfire Bomb charges
reviewReasons: The displayed base spell has one charge; verify the Survival build-adjusted maximum used by the analyzer.

templates.name: Watch low Mana

templates.name: Use Touch of the Magi

templates.name: Avoid capped Fire Blast charges
reviewReasons: Charge count and recharge can be altered by Fire Mage build interactions and haste.

templates.name: Avoid capping Energy

templates.name: Watch low Mana

recommendedEngineBacklog.reason: Aura metrics can now flag stack state, but a held-proc metric such as Tempest would be stronger with an optional duration threshold such as held >= 5 seconds.
Required for Holy, Protection, and Retribution Paladin rotational waste analysis.
Required for Death Knight rune-capping and rune-starvation analysis.
Required for meaningful Arcane Mage state analysis.
Required for Vengeance Demon Hunter and Devourer Demon Hunter core-resource analysis.
Required for Brewmaster purification timing and risk analysis.
Enhancement Shaman uses Maelstrom Weapon stacks rather than Elemental-style Maelstrom power. An aura fallback is included, but a first-class stack metric is cleaner.
Enemy DoT maintenance templates should not flag every trash enemy indiscriminately.
Maintenance buffs and defensive coverage should be evaluated only during relevant damage or active-tanking windows.
Talent replacements such as Revival versus Restoral should be selectable as one logical template.
Many cooldowns change with talents, haste, and cooldown reduction. The static defaults should be treated as editable starting points.

legacyResourceNotes.pain: Pain is a legacy Vengeance Demon Hunter resource enum. Current Vengeance uses Fury nominally, while Soul Fragments are the more important gameplay resource. Keep Pain only for backward compatibility with old logs or enum completeness.
